name: Rahul Sharma
review: Trending Aquarium transformed my living room with a beautiful custom aquarium. Their team is professional, prompt, and the water quality has been perfect for 6 months now!

name: Priya Mehta
review: I was struggling to maintain my fish tank until I found them. Monthly maintenance plan is very affordable and they always come on time. Highly recommended!

name: Amit Verma
review: Set up a huge 6-foot aquarium for my office. The setup was done in a day and looked absolutely stunning. All my colleagues love it. Great service!

name: Sneha Kapoor
review: Very knowledgeable about fish health and water chemistry. They identified a disease in my fish early and treated it quickly. Will continue using their service.

name: Vikram Singh
review: Custom aquarium design for my home was exactly what I imagined. They understood my vision perfectly. The plants and fish combination looks like a dream!
